title: Trigun
sourceNotes: Original 1998 anime (26 eps) loosely adapts Trigun manga (3 vols / 23 chapters) in eps 1-13, then continues with anime-original material inspired by early Trigun Maximum. The Trigun Maximum sequel manga (AniList id 30704, 14 vols / 104 ch) is not covered here. Trigun Stampede (2023) and Trigun Stargaze (2026) are separate CGI re-adaptations.
